title: Best SPC Flooring Supplier in Gurgaon | Waterproof Wooden Flooring
shortDescription: 100% waterproof luxury wooden flooring. Made with a strong stone core, it looks exactly like real wood but never gets damaged by water, scratches, or termites.
longDescription:
Upgrade to the future of wooden flooring with Goals Floors' Cobra Gold SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) Series. If you want the luxury of real wood but are worried about water damage, termites, or scratches, SPC is your ultimate solution.

Unlike traditional wooden laminate floors that swell up when wet, our SPC flooring is built with a rock-solid stone core. This makes it 100% waterproof and termite-proof. It is designed perfectly for the harsh climate and busy lifestyle of Gurugram and Delhi NCR. With a heavy-duty 0.5mm protective top layer, it easily handles heavy foot traffic in corporate offices, retail stores, and busy homes with kids and pets.

Enjoy the stunning look and feel of natural hardwood with zero maintenance tension. It installs directly over your old tiles in just 1 to 2 days without any messy cement or demolition.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: The strong stone core absorbs zero moisture. It will never swell, warp, or attract termites (deemak), making it perfectly safe for kitchens and basements.

features.title: Ultra-Tough Top Layer (0.5mm)
features.description: Built for heavy commercial traffic. This thick transparent shield protects the floor from deep scratches, high heels, moving furniture, and pet claws.

features.title: Feels Like Real Wood (EIR Tech)
features.description: We use advanced 3D printing technology so the physical texture matches the wood design perfectly. It doesn't just look like wood, it feels like it.

features.title: Fast, Glue-Free Installation
features.description: Uses a smart 'Uniclick' system. The planks seamlessly lock together like a puzzle without needing any messy adhesives, cement, or nails.

features.title: Premium Painted V-Groove
features.description: Each plank has carefully painted, slightly beveled edges. This gives your floor the authentic, expensive look of individual hardwood planks.

features.title: Quiet & Fire Safe
features.description: Installed with a sound-absorbing foam underlay so it doesn't make a hollow clicking sound when walking. It is also fire-retardant for your family's safety.

installation: The installation is completely dry and mess-free. You do not need to break your old floor. As long as your existing tiles or marble are flat and clean, we lay down a soft acoustic foam sheet and simply click the SPC planks together. Matching wooden skirting and T-profiles are added at the walls and doors for a professional finish.
maintenance: It requires almost zero maintenance. You can sweep or vacuum it daily. Because it is 100% waterproof, you can freely use a wet mop (pocha) with normal floor cleaners. Just avoid throwing buckets of water or using harsh wire scrubbers.

faqs.question: What is the difference between SPC and Laminate Flooring?
faqs.answer: Laminate flooring has a wood-dust (HDF) core which can swell if too much water is left on it. SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) has a stone core, making it 100% waterproof, much stronger, and completely safe from termites.

faqs.question: Can I install SPC flooring directly over my old tiles?
faqs.answer: Yes! This saves you a lot of money and time. As long as your existing tile or marble floor is flat and level, we can install the SPC planks directly over it.

faqs.question: Is it safe to use a wet mop (pocha) on this floor?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. Because SPC flooring is 100% waterproof, you can clean it daily with a wet mop, just like you would clean normal floor tiles.

faqs.question: Can I install it in my kitchen and bathroom?
faqs.answer: It is highly recommended for kitchens because it is waterproof and easy to clean. You can also use it in bathroom dry areas, but we do not recommend it for wet shower areas.

faqs.question: Will my dog's nails scratch this floor?
faqs.answer: No. Our flooring comes with a 0.5mm commercial-grade wear layer. It is extremely tough and highly resistant to scratches from pet claws and moving furniture.

faqs.question: Does it make a hollow clicking sound when I walk?
faqs.answer: No. We install a premium acoustic foam underlay (IXPE/EVA) beneath the planks. This absorbs the sound and makes walking very comfortable and quiet.

faqs.question: Do I need to buy skirting and other profiles?
faqs.answer: Yes. To give the floor a neat, premium look, matching wooden skirting is used on the walls, and T-profiles or Reducers are used near doors and uneven floor joints.

faqs.question: How long does the installation take in a normal house?
faqs.answer: Because of our fast 'Uniclick' system, there is no cement drying time. A standard 2 or 3-bedroom apartment can be completed in just 1 to 2 days.

faqs.question: Is SPC flooring safe for kids?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is 100% safe. It is non-toxic, free from harmful formaldehydes, and very easy to sanitize, making it perfect for homes with children.

faqs.question: Do you supply SPC flooring for large commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier across Delhi NCR. We offer special project pricing, ready stocks, and expert installation for architects, builders, and interior designers.

installationSteps.title: Check the Old Floor
points: Ensure your existing floor is completely flat and level.
Sweep and clean to ensure it is dust-free.
No moisture issues should be present.
installationSteps.tip: A flat floor prevents the planks from bending when you walk on them.

installationSteps.title: Lay the Acoustic Underlay
points: Roll out the premium sound-absorbing foam sheet (IXPE/EVA).
Use tape to seal the seams so the foam doesn't move.
This makes walking quiet and comfortable.

installationSteps.title: Click & Lock the Planks
installationSteps.description: Install without any glue or cement:
points: Take an SPC plank, angle it at 30 degrees.
Insert it into the groove of the previous plank.
Press it down firmly to lock it in place seamlessly.
Use a small tapping block to ensure the joints are invisible.

installationSteps.title: Maintain Wall Gaps
points: Leave a small gap (around 1/4 inch) near all the walls.
This gap is covered later by wooden skirting.
It allows the building to naturally shift without buckling the floor.
